onClose.description: Called when the drawer should close.

position.description: Edge from which the drawer slides in.

size.description: Width (horizontal) or height (vertical) of the drawer.

backdrop.description: Show a dark backdrop behind the drawer.

pushContent.description: Push the main content instead of overlaying.

pushContentSelector.description: CSS selector for the element to push when pushContent is enabled. Defaults to '#root' or the first body child.

closeOnEscape.description: Close drawer on Escape key press.

closeOnBackdropClick.description: Close drawer when clicking the backdrop.

title.description: Plain-text title rendered as the drawer header (when no custom header is supplied) and used as the dialog's accessible name.

ariaLabel.description: Accessible name for the dialog. Use when there's no visible title.

ariaLabelledBy.description: ID of an element that labels the dialog. Overrides ariaLabel/title when set.

header.description: Header content. When provided, shows a header bar with close button.

footer.description: Footer content rendered at the bottom.

children.description: Main body content of the drawer.

className.description: Additional CSS class for the drawer panel.
